message:
refactor(metal): DRY batch binary operations with gpuBatchBinaryArrays helper

Consolidate duplicate GPU/CPU fallback pattern from 4 functions:
- gpuBatchMulArrays, gpuBatchAddArrays, gpuBatchSubArrays, gpuBatchDivArrays

Uses BinaryOp enum + comptime switch for operation selection.
-43 lines (~8% reduction)
